app.name: openclinical-ai
app.subtagline: the hub of AI for healthcare & biology · Apache 2.0
setup.title: Sign in to your agency
setup.hint: Multi-tenant. Pick your agency, sign in with your agency credentials. Your agency owns the encryption keys for your data.
setup.shared: shared key — not recommended for healthcare
today.title: Today's visits
today.hint: Voice-first. Tap a visit to start documentation. GPS check-in verifies you arrived. Clock-out captures billing-ready timestamps.
visit.title: Visit in progress
visit.notes_placeholder: Tap mic to dictate, or type. Notes are sanitized for prompt-injection before being sent to the AI.
visit.family_note_placeholder: Optional plain-language summary family caregivers will see. Auto-redacts clinical detail.
result.title: Visit summary
audit.title: Recent audit events
audit.hint: Every inference + every consent decision is logged to the tenant-scoped audit log. Audit data is encrypted with your agency's keys.
audit.none: No audit events yet for this tenant.
family.title: Family portal
family.hint: Read-only view of your loved one's care. Family caregivers see only the family-visible notes the PSW wrote + the visit timeline. No PHI. No clinical detail.
connectors.title: Healthcare Connectors
connectors.hint: All major healthcare and biotech systems can connect to openclinical-ai. Below are the connectors our ecosystem supports. Honest status: planned / in-development / available / community.
business.title: Business Portal
business.hint: For healthcare agencies, hospitals, and biotech companies. Onboard your organization to openclinical-ai in three simple steps.
business.hero_desc: Multi-billion dollar companies connect just as simply as small home care agencies. The same equity-first platform. The same transparency.
business.step1_desc: Fill out the form below. We'll provision your tenant with your own encryption keys, audit log, and consent engine within 24 hours.
business.step2_desc: FHIR R4, HL7v2, custom webhooks, or direct API. Our connector registry has 15+ healthcare systems. Pick what works for your stack.
business.step3_desc: Single-container Docker deploy or on-prem air-gapped. PSW voice UI works on any device. No IT burden.
business.form_success: Application submitted. We'll provision your tenant within 24 hours.
settings.title: Settings
news.title: Biology & Biotech News
news.hint: Global biology and biotechnology news. Top stories, companies to watch, and what to look forward to. Curated daily.
footer: openclinical-ai — sovereign open substrate for clinical AI. Apache 2.0.
footer.small: Multi-tenant by design. Each agency has its own encryption keys, audit log, consent records, and rate limits. No cross-tenant data flow. PSW free-text notes are sanitized for prompt-injection before being sent to AI models. All processing happens in your jurisdiction. No data leaves your network.
